patches.before_text: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law.
patches.after_text: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law.
patches.ground_span: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law.

patches.before_text: "Processing" means any operation performed on Personal Data, including collection, access, storage, hosting, organization, retrieval, transmission, analysis, deletion, and return.
patches.after_text: Vendor may process personal data outside a service instruction only to the extent applicable law requires. Vendor updates the instruction log every 30 days and supplies deletion confirmation within 12 days after completion.
patches.ground_span: Vendor may process personal data outside a service instruction only to the extent applicable law requires. Vendor updates the instruction log every 30 days and supplies deletion confirmation within 12 days after completion.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Processing" means any operation performed on Personal Data, including collection, access, storage, hosting, organization, retrieval, transmission, analysis, deletion, and return.

patches.before_text: Vendor will process Personal Data only as necessary to provide the services to Customer, secure and support those services, or comply with applicable law. Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.
patches.after_text: Vendor may use the resulting information for independent analytics, benchmarking, product development, and model improvement. The information is pseudonymized but remains linkable to individuals. Service-analytics working files are retained for 30 days, and anonymization controls are reviewed every 3 months.
patches.ground_span: Vendor may use the resulting information for independent analytics, benchmarking, product development, and model improvement. The information is pseudonymized but remains linkable to individuals. Service-analytics working files are retained for 30 days, and anonymization controls are reviewed every 3 months.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will not use personal data for its own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, or other independent business purposes.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will process Personal Data only as necessary to provide the services to Customer, secure and support those services, or comply with applicable law. Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.

patches.before_text: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.
patches.after_text: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Personal Data" means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Personal Data" means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations.

patches.after_text: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
patches.ground_span: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a personal-data breach.

patches.before_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA.
patches.after_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA. For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA. For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.

patches.before_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion.
patches.after_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
